title: Light Up LED Mini Table Football - Compact Portable Arcade-Style Gaming, Battery-Operated with Sliding Scoreboards, Fast-Paced Action Table Game Set for All Ages Family Fun
features: Home Arcade Gaming Experience: Transform any room into your personal arcade with this light up mini football table for kids. The design features an LED function, bringing excitement to every match of hover football

Quick-Scoring Action: Built-in sliding scoreboards track every goal like a proper arcade game table. Watch the competitive spirit soar as players battle it out, sending the football flying across the smooth playing surface

Skill-Building Fun: This tabletop games favourite sharpens hand-eye coordination and reflexes through fast-paced play. Children develop strategic thinking and motor skills whilst having a brilliant time with their friends & family!

Portable Power: Battery-operated air flow creates smooth, hover-like ball movement for non-stop indoor games. The lightweight design means you can easily move this air football excitement from room to room

Family Game Night Ready: These arcade games for kids bring endless entertainment for children ages 6 and up. The table games champion fits neatly on desks and tabletops, bringing indoor football excitement to any space, right out of the box
description: Turn game time into an epic LED adventure with this thrilling air hockey table, ideal as a gift for arcade game-loving kids aged 6 and up. This compact table brings arcade-style excitement to any room, complete with sliding scoreboards and smooth-gliding action. Whether you're planning birthday celebrations or looking for Christmas gifts, this portable game delivers hours of fast-paced fun whilst helping develop hand-eye coordination. Fun and excitement for all the family!
